/usr/bin/ar qc libimss_static.a CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/crc.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/stat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/imss.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/redis.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/comms.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/workers.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/queue.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/hercules.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/policies.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/directory.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/records.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/map_ep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/slog.c.o CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/map_server_eps.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imss_static.dir/__/src/shared_memory.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libimss_static.a
